response:
Sure! Here's the rewritten version of your query with all personally identifiable information removed and replaced with generic placeholders:

---

Write an email to [Recipient Name]; apologize to her for the delay in payment and inform her that [Amount] has been transferred to the [Company Name] IBAN account. I have attached the payment receipt in this email. Please send the ordered products.

--- 

Let me know if you'd like the actual email draft written as well.
